_doc: Pinned runtime metadata for the Mac extraction harness. Phase 0 fills in PENDING values. The harness fails fast if any PENDING remains when run end-to-end.

_llamaCppHints.instruction: Pick a recent llama.cpp commit that documents Qwen2.5-VL or MiniCPM-V support, or align with whatever scripts/build_llama_cpp.sh pins for Android. Record the full 40-char SHA.

_assetHashHints.instruction: Copy hashes from app/src/test/resources/asset_hashes.txt — the AssetHashDriftTest pins them. promptTemplateSha256 = hash of prompt_templates/coupon_extraction_prompt.txt; schemaSha256 = hash of coupon_schema.gbnf.

_inferenceBackendHints.doc: Phase 0 parity target. Mac always runs llama.cpp; Android must match for parity comparisons. Android's CMake default is currently MLC (in-flight migration), so parity builds need the flag below.
todoForAndroidSide: Add buildConfigField "String", "LLM_BACKEND", with the resolved CMake flag in app/build.gradle.kts
ExtractionSmokeTest.kt should include BuildConfig.LLM_BACKEND in extraction_smoke_report.json
scripts/extraction_eval/compare_android.py should call backend_check.assert_backend_parity() before comparing fields

_ocrSourceLabels.doc: OCR sidecars are tagged via an optional top-level _source field. Manual or Mac-Tesseract sources are TEST FIXTURES, not Android parity. Real Android parity requires _source="android-mlkit-tesseract" sidecars produced by scripts/capture_android_ocr_sidecars.sh.

values.tesseract-mac: Generated by scripts/generate_ocr_sidecars.sh. Mac-only OCR, missing ML Kit step. Not Android-parity.
values.android-mlkit-tesseract: Captured from real Android run via scripts/capture_android_ocr_sidecars.sh. The only source that constitutes parity.
